mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores (store_id, store_name, is_active, icon_url) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{storeName}, #{active}, #{iconUrl}) ON CONFLICT (store_id) DO UPDATE SET store_name = EXCLUDED.store_name, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, icon_url = EXCLUDED.icon_url

INSERT INTO games (game_id, title, steam_app_id, thumb_url, metacritic_score, steam_rating_pct, release_date) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{title}, #{steamAppId}, #{thumbUrl}, #{metacriticScore}, #{steamRatingPct}, #{releaseDate}) ON CONFLICT (game_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, steam_app_id = EXCLUDED.steam_app_id, thumb_url = EXCLUDED.thumb_url, metacritic_score = EXCLUDED.metacritic_score, steam_rating_pct = EXCLUDED.steam_rating_pct, release_date = EXCLUDED.release_date

INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, game_id, store_id, sale_price, normal_price, savings, deal_rating, currency, is_on_sale, last_change) VALUES (#{dealId}, #{gameId}, #{storeId}, #{salePrice}, #{normalPrice}, #{savings}, #{dealRating}, #{currency}, #{onSale}, #{lastChange}) ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO UPDATE SET game_id = EXCLUDED.game_id, store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, sale_price = EXCLUDED.sale_price, normal_price = EXCLUDED.normal_price, savings = EXCLUDED.savings, deal_rating = EXCLUDED.deal_rating, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, is_on_sale = EXCLUDED.is_on_sale, last_change = EXCLUDED.last_change
mapper.select:
SELECT d.deal_id, g.title, d.game_id, d.store_id, s.store_name, d.sale_price, d.normal_price, d.savings, d.currency, g.thumb_url FROM deals d JOIN games g ON g.game_id = d.game_id JOIN stores s ON s.store_id = d.store_id
ORDER BY
d.sale_price ASC, d.deal_id d.savings DESC, d.deal_id d.deal_rating DESC NULLS LAST, d.savings DESC, d.deal_id
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT store_id, store_name, icon_url FROM stores WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY store_id::int
